basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Principal Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Principal Project Scientist Notification 2026 has been released on 14-05-2026 on the official website of Indian Institute of Technology Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Principal Project Scientist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: PhD in electrical engineering, physics, nanotechnology or related disciplines. Experience in working with semiconductors, optics and particularly instrumentation is necessary.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Principal Project Scientist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Principal Project Scientist position at IIT Delhi is 28th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in electrical engineering, physics, nanotechnology, or related disciplines, along with necessary experience in semiconductors, optics, and instrumentation.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Principal Project Scientist role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 75,600 to Rs. 1,01,610, plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Principal Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Principal Project Scientist at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the IIT Delhi Principal Project Scientist recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their application via email to the designated address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Principal Project Scientist is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Delhi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110016.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, and further details are available on the official website.
